NEXUS DTE Unplanned Outage -- COMPLETE


Notice Text:

NEXUS has been informed by DTE that beginning Gas Day March 10, 2026, DTE has completed the previously posted unplanned system maintenance effecting NEXUS capacity.  All restrictions associated with this outage will be lifted.

 

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
